articles.title: Globe Magazine names New England’s 50 fastest-growing companies
articles.description:
Now in its second year, the collaboration between The Boston Globe and Statista highlights the businesses growing quickest across the region.

The post Globe Magazine names New England’s 50 fastest-growing companies appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Globe Magazine identifies 50 fastest-growing companies in New England for 2023.
Statista collaborated with The Boston Globe for this annual ranking.
Local businesses may benefit from increased visibility and investment opportunities.

articles.title: Judge denies Lindsay Clancy’s request for two-part murder trial
articles.description:
Clancy will stand trial in July for allegedly killing her three children in 2023.

The post Judge denies Lindsay Clancy’s request for two-part murder trial appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Judge denies Lindsay Clancy's request for a two-part murder trial.
Clancy will face trial in July 2023 for allegedly killing her three children.
The trial outcome may significantly affect community discussions on mental health and family safety.

articles.title: What we know about the armed robbery of a massive Beverly mansion
articles.description:
The property's caretaker was beaten with a pistol and dragged by her hair by a masked intruder, according to the homeowner.

The post What we know about the armed robbery of a massive Beverly mansion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Masked intruder assaulted the caretaker of a Beverly mansion during an armed robbery.
The caretaker was beaten with a pistol and dragged by her hair.
Residents in Beverly are concerned about safety following this violent incident.

articles.title: Walmart closes Worcester fulfillment center, laying off 90 employees
articles.description:
The retail giant says the closure is part of an effort to streamline fulfillment and improve delivery speeds.

The post Walmart closes Worcester fulfillment center, laying off 90 employees appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Walmart closed its Worcester fulfillment center on March 31, 2026.
The closure resulted in the layoff of 90 employees.
Local residents may face reduced job opportunities and slower delivery services.

articles.title: Long-planned Nubian Square jazz club finally secures funding
articles.description:
Launched almost 10 years ago by Berklee professor and record-label owner Bill Banfield, the restaurant and community arts space now has $2.5 million to move forward.

The post Long-planned Nubian Square jazz club finally secures funding appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nubian Square jazz club secures $2.5 million funding to move forward.
Project launched by Berklee professor Bill Banfield nearly 10 years ago.
Funding will enhance community arts and dining options for Boston residents.
